nasb.text: Then Hazael king of Aram went up and fought against Gath and captured it, and Hazael set his face to go up to Jerusalem.

esv.text: At that time Hazael king of Syria went up and fought against Gath and took it. But when Hazael set his face to go up against Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 那時亞蘭王哈薛上來，攻打迦特，把它奪取了。他又決心上來攻打耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 那时，亚兰王哈薛攻陷了迦特，准备进攻耶路撒冷。
